mapper.select: SELECT CODE_ID as id ,CODE_GRP as codeGrp ,CODE_NM as codeNm ,CODE_ENG_NM as codeEngNm ,CODE_VAL as codeVal ,CODE_VAL_DESC as codeValDesc ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId FROM TB_CODE_DATA ORDER BY CODE_NM, CODE_VAL

SELECT CODE_ID as id ,CODE_GRP as codeGrp ,CODE_NM as codeNm ,CODE_ENG_NM as codeEngNm ,CODE_VAL as codeVal ,CODE_VAL_DESC as codeValDesc ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId FROM TB_CODE_DATA WHERE CODE_NM ILIKE '%' || #{codeNm} || '%' ORDER BY CODE_NM, CODE_VAL

SELECT CODE_ID as id ,CODE_GRP as codeGrp ,CODE_NM as codeNm ,CODE_ENG_NM as codeEngNm ,CODE_VAL as codeVal ,CODE_VAL_DESC as codeValDesc ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId FROM TB_CODE_DATA WHERE CODE_ENG_NM = #{codeEngNm} ORDER BY CODE_NM, CODE_VAL

SELECT CODE_ID as id ,CODE_GRP as codeGrp ,CODE_NM as codeNm ,CODE_ENG_NM as codeEngNm ,CODE_VAL as codeVal ,CODE_VAL_DESC as codeValDesc ,to_char(to_timestamp(CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as cretDt ,CRET_USER_ID as cretUserId ,to_char(to_timestamp(UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updtDt ,UPDT_USER_ID as updtUserId FROM TB_CODE_DATA WHERE CODE_NM = #{codeNm} AND CODE_VAL = #{codeVal} ORDER BY CODE_NM, CODE_VAL
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TB_CODE_DATA WHERE CODE_ID IN
#{item.id}
